-spec solve(list(list(integer())), integer()) -> integer().

solve(Grid, K) ->
    M = length(Grid),
    N = length(hd(Grid)),
    Dist = make_dist(M, N, infinity),
    Dist0 = set_dist(Dist, 0, 0, 0),
    PQ = priority_queue:empty(),
    priority_queue:enqueue(PQ, {0, 0, 0, 0}),
    loop(Grid, K, M, N, Dist0, PQ).

make_dist(M, N, Val) ->
    lists:mapfun(fun _ -> lists:mapfun(fun _ -> Val end, lists:seq(1, N)) end, lists:seq(1, M)).

set_dist(Dist, X, Y, Val) ->
    lists:mapfun(
        fun(I) ->
            lists:mapfun(
                fun(J) ->
                    if I == X andalso J == Y -> Val;
                       true -> Dist[I][J]
                    end
                end, lists:seq(1, length(hd(Dist))))
        end, lists:seq(1, length(Dist))).

loop(Grid, K, M, N, Dist, PQ) ->
    case priority_queue:peek(PQ) of
        {Cost, X, Y, Transmits} ->
            case {X, Y} of
                {M-1, N-1} -> Cost;
                _ ->
                    case Transmits < K of
                        true ->
                            RegularMoves(Grid, M, N, Cost, X, Y, Dist, PQ, K);
                        false ->
                            loop(Grid, K, M, N, Dist, PQ)
                    end
            end
    end.

RegularMoves(Grid, M, N, Cost, X, Y, Dist, PQ, K) ->
    Next = [[0, 1], [1, 0]],
    NewPQ = lists:foldl(
        fun({DX, DY}, Acc) ->
            NX = X + DX,
            NY = Y + DY,
            case {NX, NY} of
                {X1, Y1} when X1 < M, Y1 < N ->
                    NewCost = Cost + element(1, lists:nth(X1, Grid))[Y1],
                    NewDist = update_dist(Dist, X1, Y1, NewCost),
                    priority_queue:enqueue(Acc, {NewCost, X1, Y1, Transmits}),
                    NewDist;
                _ -> Acc
            end
        end, PQ, Next),
    TeleportMoves(Grid, M, N, Cost, K, NewPQ, Dist).

TeleportMoves(Grid, M, N, Cost, K, PQ, Dist) ->
    CurrentVal = element(1, lists:nth(X, Grid))[Y],
    TeleportCells = lists:flatmap(
        fun(I) ->
            lists:flatmap(
                fun(J) ->
                    if element(1, lists:nth(I, Grid))[J] =< CurrentVal ->
                           {I, J};
                       true -> []
                    end
                end, lists:seq(1, N))
        end, lists:seq(1, M)),
    NewPQ = lists:foldl(
        fun({I, J}, Acc) ->
            if I == X andalso J == Y -> Acc;
               true ->
                    NewCost = Cost,
                    NewTransmits = Transmits + 1,
                    NewDist = update_dist(Dist, I, J, NewCost),
                    priority_queue:enqueue(Acc, {NewCost, I, J, NewTransmits})
               end
        end, PQ, TeleportCells),
    loop(Grid, K, M, N, Dist, NewPQ).

update_dist(Dist, X, Y, Val) ->
    lists:mapfun(
        fun(I) ->
            lists:mapfun(
                fun(J) ->
                    if I == X andalso J == Y -> Val;
                       true -> Dist[I][J]
                    end
                end, lists:seq(1, length(hd(Dist))))
        end, lists:seq(1, length(Dist))).
```

-spec solve(list(list(integer())), integer()) -> integer().

solve(Grid, K) ->
    M = length(Grid),
    N = length(hd(Grid)),
    Dist = make_dist(M, N, infinity),
    Dist1 = set_dist(Dist, 0, 0, 0),
    PQ = priority_queue:new(),
    priority_queue:insert(PQ, {0, 0, 0, 0}),
    loop(PQ, Dist1, M, N, Grid, K).

make_dist(M, N, Val) ->
    lists:mapfun(fun _ -> lists:mapfun(fun _ -> Val end, lists:seq(1, N)) end, lists:seq(1, M)).

set_dist(Dist, X, Y, Val) ->
    lists:mapfun(fun(I) ->
        lists:mapfun(fun(J) ->
            if I == X andalso J == Y -> Val;
               true -> Dist[I][J]
            end
        end, lists:seq(1, length(hd(Dist))))
    end, lists:seq(1, length(Dist))).

loop(PQ, Dist, M, N, Grid, K) ->
    case priority_queue:peek(PQ) of
        {Cost, X, Y, Transmits} ->
            case {X, Y} of
                {M-1, N-1} -> Cost;
                _ ->
                    case Transmits < K of
                        true ->
                            RegularMoves(PQ, Dist, M, N, Grid, K, X, Y, Transmits);
                        false ->
                            loop(PQ, Dist, M, N, Grid, K)
                    end
            end
    end.

RegularMoves(PQ, Dist, M, N, Grid, K, X, Y, Transmits) ->
    RegularMove(PQ, Dist, M, N, Grid, K, X, Y, Transmits, 0, 1),
    RegularMove(PQ, Dist, M, N, Grid, K, X, Y, Transmits, 1, 0),
    Teleport(PQ, Dist, M, N, Grid, K, X, Y, Transmits).

RegularMove(PQ, Dist, M, N, Grid, K, X, Y, Transmits, Dx, Dy) ->
    Nx = X + Dx,
    Ny = Y + Dy,
    case {Nx, Ny} of
        {X1, Y1} when X1 < M, Y1 < N ->
            NewCost = get_dist(Dist, X1, Y1) + Grid[X1][Y1],
            case NewCost < get_dist(Dist, X1, Y1) of
                true ->
                    NewDist = set_dist(Dist, X1, Y1, NewCost),
                    PQ1 = priority_queue:insert(PQ, {NewCost, X1, Y1, Transmits}),
                    loop(PQ1, NewDist, M, N, Grid, K);
                false ->
                    loop(PQ, Dist, M, N, Grid, K)
            end;
        _ ->
            loop(PQ, Dist, M, N, Grid, K)
    end.

Teleport(PQ, Dist, M, N, Grid, K, X, Y, Transmits) ->
    CurrentVal = Grid[X][Y],
    lists:foreach(fun(I) ->
        lists:foreach(fun(J) ->
            case {I, J} of
                {X, Y} -> ok;
                _ when Grid[I][J] =< CurrentVal ->
                    NewCost = get_dist(Dist, I, J),
                    case NewCost > get_dist(Dist, I, J) of
                        true ->
                            NewDist = set_dist(Dist, I, J, NewCost),
                            PQ1 = priority_queue:insert(PQ, {NewCost, I, J, Transmits + 1}),
                            loop(PQ1, NewDist, M, N, Grid, K);
                        false ->
                            ok
                    end
            end
        end, lists:seq(1, N))
    end, lists:seq(1, M)).

get_dist(Dist, X, Y) ->
    Dist[X][Y].
```

-spec solve(list(list(integer())), integer()) -> integer().

solve(Grid, K) ->
    M = length(Grid),
    N = length(hd(Grid)),
    Dist = make_dist(M, N, infinity),
    Dist0 = set_dist(Dist, 0, 0, 0),
    PQ = priority_queue:empty(),
    priority_queue:enqueue(PQ, {0, 0, 0, 0}),
    loop(Grid, K, M, N, Dist0, PQ).

make_dist(M, N, Val) ->
    lists:mapfun(fun(_) -> lists:mapfun(fun(_) -> Val end, lists:seq(1, N)) end, lists:seq(1, M)).

set_dist(Dist, X, Y, Val) ->
    lists:mapfun(fun(I) -> lists:mapfun(fun(J) -> if I == X andalso J == Y -> Val; true -> Dist[I][J] end end, lists:seq(1, length(hd(Dist)))) end, lists:seq(1, length(Dist))).

loop(Grid, K, M, N, Dist, PQ) ->
    case priority_queue:peek(PQ) of
        {Cost, X, Y, Transmits} ->
            case {X, Y} of
                {M-1, N-1} ->
                    Cost;
                _ ->
                    NewPQ = priority_queue:dequeue(PQ),
                    RegularMoves(Grid, M, N, Cost, X, Y, Transmits, Dist, NewPQ),
                    TeleportMoves(Grid, M, N, Cost, X, Y, Transmits, K, Dist, NewPQ)
            end
    end.

RegularMoves(Grid, M, N, Cost, X, Y, Transmits, Dist, PQ) ->
    Moves = [[0, 1], [1, 0]],
    lists:foreach(fun({DX, DY}) ->
        NX = X + DX,
        NY = Y + DY,
        case {NX, NY} of
            {X1, Y1} when X1 < M, Y1 < N ->
                NewCost = Cost + element(2, lists:nth(X1, Grid)), % grid is 0-based
                NewDist = update_dist(Dist, X1, Y1, NewCost),
                NewPQ = priority_queue:enqueue(PQ, {NewCost, X1, Y1, Transmits}),
                loop(Grid, K, M, N, NewDist, NewPQ)
        end
    end, Moves).

TeleportMoves(Grid, M, N, Cost, X, Y, Transmits, K, Dist, PQ) ->
    CurrentVal = element(2, lists:nth(X, Grid)),
    lists:foreach(fun(I) ->
        lists:foreach(fun(J) ->
            if
                I == X andalso J == Y -> ok;
                true ->
                    if
                        element(2, lists:nth(I, Grid)) =< CurrentVal ->
                            NewCost = Cost,
                            NewDist = update_dist(Dist, I, J, NewCost),
                            NewTransmits = Transmits + 1,
                            case NewTransmits =< K of
                                true ->
                                    NewPQ = priority_queue:enqueue(PQ, {NewCost, I, J, NewTransmits}),
                                    loop(Grid, K, M, N, NewDist, NewPQ);
                                false ->
                                    ok
                            end
                    end
            end
        end, lists:seq(1, N))
    end, lists:seq(1, M)).

update_dist(Dist, X, Y, Value) ->
    lists:mapfun(fun(I) ->
        lists:mapfun(fun(J) ->
            if I == X andalso J == Y -> Value;
                true -> Dist[I][J]
            end
        end, lists:seq(1, length(hd(Dist))))
    end, lists:seq(1, length(Dist))).
